## ✅ Checklist

### Mandatory Requirements

- [ ] **README.md** follows InfraTales branding format
- [ ] **LICENSE** file present (InfraTales Open Source License)
- [ ] **CONTRIBUTING.md** included
- [ ] **SECURITY.md** included

### Documentation

- [ ] `docs/cost.md` with cost estimates
- [ ] `docs/security.md` with security overview
- [ ] `docs/runbook.md` with operations guide
- [ ] `docs/troubleshooting.md` with common issues

### Diagrams

- [ ] `diagrams/architecture.mmd` (Mermaid format)
- [ ] `diagrams/sequence.mmd` (Mermaid format)
- [ ] `diagrams/dataflow.mmd` (Mermaid format)

### Code Quality

- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] InfraTales code headers on all source files
- [ ] Tests pass locally

### Security

- [ ] IAM follows least privilege
- [ ] Encryption enabled where applicable
- [ ] Security groups properly restricted
